text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Can I get the B combo with a salad<n>as the side?

text_block_list.name: Cafe Lady
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh, I'm sorry! Looks like we only<n>have the A
combo left, dearie.

What? That's the deep-fried stuff,<n>isn't it? In that
case...

And the only side left is the bucket of<n>fries... But
you're a growing girl, so<n>you should eat up!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin doesn't look very well...
